x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Field agent skills enable Now Assist FSM to match work orders to the most qualified agent.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Define field agent skills via wm_skill_list.do. Assign skills to all active field agents via wm_agent_skill. Target: 10+ skill definitions, 20+ agent skill assignments. Now Assist FSM uses skills data for AI-matched dispatch.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_47f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cb4
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Field agent skills enable Now Assist FSM to match work orders to the most qualified agent.]]></ai_justification><check_name>FSM Agent Skill Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var skillTable = new GlideRecord("cmn_skill");
    if (!skillTable.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table cmn_skill not found", finding: "Skills table (cmn_skill) is not available on this instance. Verify the Skills plugin is active." };
    }
    var gaSkills = new GlideAggregate("cmn_skill");
    gaSkills.addQuery("active", true);
    gaSkills.addAggregate("COUNT");
    gaSkills.query();
    var skills = gaSkills.next() ? parseInt(gaSkills.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var agentSkills = 0;
    var userSkillTable = new GlideRecord("sys_user_has_skill");
    if (userSkillTable.isValid()) {
        var gaAssigned = new GlideAggregate("sys_user_has_skill");
        gaAssigned.addAggregate("COUNT");
        gaAssigned.query();
        agentSkills = gaAssigned.next() ? parseInt(gaAssigned.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    }
    var actualValue = skills + " skill definitions | " + agentSkills + " agent skill assignments";
    if (skills >= 10 && agentSkills >= 20) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: skills + " skills with " + agentSkills + " agent assignments. Now Assist FSM has comprehensive skills data for competency-matched AI dispatch." };
    } else if (skills >= 3 || agentSkills >= 5) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Partial skills configuration (" + skills + " skills, " + agentSkills + " assignments). Targets: 10+ skills, 20+ assignments. Now Assist FSM skill-based AI dispatch will have limited matching accuracy." };
    } else {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Insufficient skills configuration (" + skills + " skills, " + agentSkills + " assignments). Now Assist FSM cannot perform competency-matched AI dispatch without defined skills and agent assignments." };
    }
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>FIELD_SERVICE</module><number>CHK0000430</number><order>30</order><remediation_guidance>Define field agent skills via wm_skill_list.do. Assign skills to all active field agents via wm_agent_skill. Target: 10+ skill definitions, 20+ agent skill assignments. Now Assist FSM uses skills data for AI-matched dispatch.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>47f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cb4</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>FSM Agent Skill Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_47f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cb4</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
